title: Biofizic Circumplex (arousal REAL x valence PROXY — limitation demo)

panels.title: READ ME — what this dashboard is (and is NOT)

options.content: **Russell circumplex built from a VALID arousal axis (HR/HRV, personal baseline) and a NON-VALIDATED valence proxy (PPA heuristic).** The valence axis is a documented negative result: its distribution is centred on 0 with no structure, and it is statistically independent of arousal (r ≈ 0.07) — i.e. independent *noise*, not a real second emotional dimension. The left/right split (calm vs bored, happy vs angry) is therefore decided largely by chance. Shown as a demonstration of *why wrist-only hardware cannot resolve valence* — NOT as a trustworthy emotion classifier. The VR decision uses arousal only.

panels.title: Circumplex scatter — arousal (X, 1-10) vs valence proxy (Y, -1..1)

targets.rawSql: SELECT CAST(l.arousal_10 AS DOUBLE) AS arousal, v.valence AS valence FROM biofizic_live l JOIN biofizic_legacy_valence v ON l.time = v.time WHERE l.arousal_10 IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(l.time)

panels.title: Quadrant over time (calm / happy / bored-sad / stress-anger)

targets.rawSql: SELECT l.time, CASE WHEN l.arousal_10 >= 5 AND v.valence >= 0 THEN 3 WHEN l.arousal_10 >= 5 AND v.valence < 0 THEN 4 WHEN l.arousal_10 < 5 AND v.valence >= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS quadrant FROM biofizic_live l JOIN biofizic_legacy_valence v ON l.time = v.time WHERE l.arousal_10 IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(l.time) ORDER BY l.time
SELECT time, arousal_10 FROM biofizic_live WHERE arousal_10 IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
